title: ALO — Cluster Usage
description: Request rates, latency percentiles, error tracking, and data volume analytics.

panels.title: Total Request Rate
panels.description: Total request count over time across the selected filters.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, count() AS "Requests" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Rate by Operation
panels.description: Request rate over time, broken down by operation. Dashed series = hourly summary-index fallback (survives raw-data ILM expiry).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_operation AS series, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND request_operation IN (    SELECT request_operation FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY request_operation ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

SELECT toStartOfHour(time_bucket) AS t, request_operation AS series, countMerge(count_state) AS value FROM alo.alo_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(time_bucket) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND request_operation IN (    SELECT request_operation FROM alo.alo_summary     WHERE $__timeFilter(time_bucket) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY request_operation ORDER BY countMerge(count_state) DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Rate by Application
panels.description: Request rate over time, broken down by application. Dashed series = hourly summary-index fallback (survives raw-data ILM expiry).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, identity_applicative_provider AS series, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND identity_applicative_provider IN (    SELECT identity_applicative_provider FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY identity_applicative_provider ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

SELECT toStartOfHour(time_bucket) AS t, identity_applicative_provider AS series, countMerge(count_state) AS value FROM alo.alo_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(time_bucket) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND identity_applicative_provider IN (    SELECT identity_applicative_provider FROM alo.alo_summary     WHERE $__timeFilter(time_bucket) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY identity_applicative_provider ORDER BY countMerge(count_state) DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Rate by Target Index
panels.description: Request rate over time, broken down by target index. Dashed series = hourly summary-index fallback (survives raw-data ILM expiry).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_target AS series, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND request_target IN (    SELECT request_target FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY request_target ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

SELECT toStartOfHour(time_bucket) AS t, request_target AS series, countMerge(count_state) AS value FROM alo.alo_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(time_bucket) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND request_target IN (    SELECT request_target FROM alo.alo_summary     WHERE $__timeFilter(time_bucket) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY request_target ORDER BY countMerge(count_state) DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Rate by Template
panels.description: Request rate over time, broken down by template. Dashed series = hourly summary-index fallback (survives raw-data ILM expiry).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_template AS series, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND request_template IN (    SELECT request_template FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY request_template ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

SELECT toStartOfHour(time_bucket) AS t, request_template AS series, countMerge(count_state) AS value FROM alo.alo_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(time_bucket) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND request_template IN (    SELECT request_template FROM alo.alo_summary     WHERE $__timeFilter(time_bucket) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY request_template ORDER BY countMerge(count_state) DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: ES Latency
panels.description: Elasticsearch response-time trend with Avg / P50 / P95 / P99. Rising P95/P99 signals tail-latency issues.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(response_es_took_ms) AS "Avg", quantile(0.5)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P50", quantile(0.95)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P95", quantile(0.99)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P99" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Count of error responses (status ≥ 400) vs total requests.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, count() AS "Errors (4xx+5xx)", count() AS "Total Requests" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) AND response_status >= 400 GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Requests by Status Code
panels.description: Top 10 response status codes by request count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT response_status AS "Status Code", count() AS "Requests" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY "Status Code" ORDER BY "Requests" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Requests by Application
panels.description: Per-application request counts and ES latency percentiles.

targets.rawSql: SELECT identity_applicative_provider AS "Application", count() AS "Requests", quantile(0.5)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P50 ES Latency (ms)", quantile(0.95)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P95 ES Latency (ms)", quantile(0.99)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P99 ES Latency (ms)" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY "Application" ORDER BY "Requests" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Read Volume (Total Hits)
panels.description: Total documents matched by queries, split by operation type.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_operation AS series, sum(response_hits) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND request_operation IN (    SELECT request_operation FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY request_operation ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Bulk Write Volume
panels.description: Total bulk documents counted from request body, split by operation type. Accurate even for interrupted requests.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_operation AS series, sum(request_bulk_doc_count) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)   AND request_operation IN (    SELECT request_operation FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template)     GROUP BY request_operation ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Payload Sizes
panels.description: Average request and response payload sizes over time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(request_size_bytes) AS "Avg Request Size", avg(response_size_bytes) AS "Avg Response Size" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Top 10 Applications
panels.description: Top 10 applicative providers by request count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT identity_applicative_provider AS bucket, count() AS "Requests" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY "Requests" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top 10 Indices
panels.description: Top 10 target indices by request count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_target AS bucket, count() AS "Requests" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY "Requests" DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT identity_username AS bucket, count() AS "Requests" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote}), $cluster) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote}), $application) AND $__conditionalAll(request_target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) AND $__conditionalAll(request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote}), $operation) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_username IN (${username:singlequote}), $username) AND $__conditionalAll(hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}]), $cost_indicator) AND $__conditionalAll(identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote}), $client_host) AND $__conditionalAll(request_template IN (${template:singlequote}), $template) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY "Requests" DESC LIMIT 10

list.name: cluster
list.label: Cluster
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT cluster_name FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT cluster_name FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000

list.name: application
list.label: Application
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT identity_applicative_provider FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT identity_applicative_provider FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000

list.name: target
list.label: Target
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT request_target FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT request_target FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000

list.name: operation
list.label: Operation
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT request_operation FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT request_operation FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000

list.name: username
list.label: Username
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT identity_username FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT identity_username FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500

list.name: cost_indicator
list.label: Cost Indicator
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT arrayJoin(if(empty(stress_cost_indicator_names), ['unflagged'], stress_cost_indicator_names)) FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT arrayJoin(if(empty(stress_cost_indicator_names), ['unflagged'], stress_cost_indicator_names)) FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500

list.name: client_host
list.label: Client Host
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT identity_client_host FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT identity_client_host FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 500

list.name: template
list.label: Template
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT request_template FROM alo.alo_summary ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
